# CtrlTrade®

CtrlTrade® is the complete operating system for trade businesses in the United Kingdom. It combines CRM, job scheduling, dispatch, invoicing, customer portal, AI voice, trade counter EPOS, and warehouse management in a single cloud platform. Built for sole traders, multi-branch operators, builders merchants, field service companies, and every trade vertical.

## Key pages

- https://ctrltrade.co.uk/ — Home / product overview
- https://ctrltrade.co.uk/features — Full feature list
- https://ctrltrade.co.uk/pricing — Pricing and plans
- https://ctrltrade.co.uk/industries — Industries served
- https://ctrltrade.co.uk/crm — CtrlTrade CRM product page
- https://ctrltrade.co.uk/ctrltradepos — CtrlTradePos® EPOS & warehouse product page
- https://ctrltrade.co.uk/customer-portal — Customer portal product page
- https://ctrltrade.co.uk/integrations — Third-party integrations
- https://ctrltrade.co.uk/addons — Platform add-ons
- https://ctrltrade.co.uk/security — Security overview
- https://ctrltrade.co.uk/marketplace — Contractor & supplier marketplace
- https://ctrltrade.co.uk/about — About CtrlTrade
- https://ctrltrade.co.uk/blog — Blog
- https://ctrltrade.co.uk/contact — Contact
